name: Sinigang Na Bangus (Milkfish in Sour Broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the fish and cut into 4-6 pieces. Season all over with salt.
2. Bring water to a boil in a pot, then add tamarind pods until they are tender. Remove the tamarind pods and strain the liquid back into the boiling water (optional).
3. Add tomatoes, onions, and green beans to the boiling mixture and cook for 1 minute or until the vegetables are almost cooked. Add fish, banana heart, and patis. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 3-5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat, add spinach leaves, and let stand for 5 minutes.
5. Serve with bagoong or patis (fish sauce).
Preparation and cooking time: 30 minutes
Serves 4
